evt-001.summary: Daily Shift Start: Dock Schedule Review & #receiving-dock Post
evt-001.description: Open dock_schedule.xlsx, filter to today's date, review all appointments for hazmat flags, oversize handling notes, and unusually large shipments. Post daily dock summary to #receiving-dock by 06:15 CST (Template 23). Due no later than 15 min after shift start per SOP §8.1.

evt-002.description: Open dock_schedule.xlsx, filter to today's date, review all appointments for hazmat flags, oversize handling notes, and unusually large shipments. Post daily dock summary to #receiving-dock by 06:15 CST (Template 23). Due no later than 15 min after shift start per SOP §8.1.

evt-006.description: Publish end-of-shift handoff post in #receiving-dock at least 15 minutes before shift end (§18.4). Post must include: open receipts still in-process, any quarantined material awaiting re-inspection, pending NCR deadlines, and timing breaches from the current shift. Close all open workbooks per §18.6.

Close all open workbooks per §18.6.

evt-011.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment Window — Batch A (SUP-0041, Alloy Direct Supply)
evt-011.description: APPT-20260414-001 | Carrier: XPO Logistics | Dock 1 | Supplier: Alloy Direct Supply (SUP-0041) | Expected POs: MER-PO-8812, MER-PO-8813 | Hazmat: N | Safety-Critical parts (DS family — drivetrain shafts). Coordinator: confirm COC and MTR on arrival per §12.1. Dock-to-stock target: 4 hours (safety-critical track).

evt-012.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment Window — Batch B (SUP-0117, Precision Gear Works)
evt-012.description: APPT-20260414-002 | Carrier: Yellow Freight | Dock 2 | Supplier: Precision Gear Works (SUP-0117) | Expected PO: MER-PO-8845 | Hazmat: N | Standard parts (GR family — gear rings). Dock-to-stock target: 2 hours (standard track). Perform quantity variance check per §10.

evt-013.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment Window — Batch C (SUP-0089, Coastal Fasteners LLC)
evt-013.description: APPT-20260414-003 | Carrier: R&L Carriers | Dock 3 | Supplier: Coastal Fasteners LLC (SUP-0089) | Expected POs: MER-PO-8820, MER-PO-8821, MER-PO-8822 | Hazmat: N | Standard parts (HW family — hardware/fasteners). Multi-line PO receipt — review §9.5 for partial fulfillment handling.

evt-014.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment Window — Hazmat Shipment (SUP-0203, ChemLube Industrial)
evt-014.description: APPT-20260415-001 | Carrier: Hazmat Express | Dock 4 | Supplier: ChemLube Industrial (SUP-0203) | Expected PO: MER-PO-8830 | Hazmat: Y | Gear lubricant (UN1993, Class 3, PG III). Follow §17.1 hazmat procedure. Verify SDS and hazmat manifest on arrival — do not unload if either is missing. Coordinate with EHS per SOP-EHS-MER-01.

evt-015.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment — Oversize Shipment (SUP-0055, MidSouth Fabricators)
evt-015.description: APPT-20260416-001 | Carrier: Specialized Transport Co. | Dock 2 | Supplier: MidSouth Fabricators (SUP-0055) | Expected PO: MER-PO-8860 | Hazmat: N | Special Handling: oversize, lift gate required. Follow §17.2 oversize and heavy-lift procedure. Confirm lift equipment availability with Curtis Yablonski (@cyablonski) prior to arrival.

evt-016.summary: Inter-Plant Transfer Arrival — Boulder Plant (AX family, safety-critical)
evt-016.description: APPT-20260417-002 | Carrier: Gear Systems Internal Fleet | Dock 1 | Origin: Boulder CO Plant | Transfer doc: IPT-2026-041 | Parts: AX family (axle components, safety-critical). Follow §17.4 inter-plant transfer procedure. Confirm supplier status from Boulder plant is Active/Preferred per §15.5 before putaway authorization.

evt-017.summary: NCR-2026-0031 Major — Supplier Response Window Closes
evt-017.description: 10-business-day Major NCR response window for Precision Gear Works (SUP-0117) closes today. NCR-2026-0031 issued 2026-03-31, PO MER-PO-8790, GR-5495 short ship.

evt-018.summary: NCR Deadline — Supplier Response Due: SUP-0041 (NCR-2026-0028, Minor)
evt-018.description: 15-business-day Minor NCR response deadline for Alloy Direct Supply (SUP-0041). NCR-2026-0028 issued 2026-03-25 for Tier 1 cosmetic damage pattern (3 occurrences in 90 days, standard parts). If no response received, notify Joon-ho Park (@jpark) per §14.5. Update ncr_log.xlsx with response status.

evt-019.summary: NCR-2026-0034 Critical — Supplier Response Window Closes
evt-019.description: 3-business-day Critical NCR response window for ChemLube Industrial (SUP-0203) closes today. NCR-2026-0034 issued 2026-04-10, MER-PO-HIST-AX, missing packing slip and COC.

evt-020.description: Re-inspection of HW-3305 (Lock Nut M8 Gr8) stock in HW-1 Bin 1D. Receipt REC-20260407-003, Coastal Fasteners LLC (SUP-0089), received 2026-04-07.

evt-021.description: Re-inspection of quarantined DS-7735 (Drivetrain Shaft 7735) from REC-20260401-007. MidSouth Fabricators (SUP-0055). MTR received 2026-04-09 and on file.

evt-022.description: 5-business-day carrier claim filing window closes today for REC-20260409-005. GR-5501 Tier 2 damage, Yellow Freight, NCR-2026-0033.

evt-023.summary: Concealed Damage Discovery Window Closing — REC-20260404-002
evt-023.description: Last day within the 10-business-day concealed damage window for REC-20260404-002 (Alloy Direct Supply, DS-family parts). Any concealed damage discovered after today will not qualify for a carrier claim per §11.7. Confirm with production floor and quality that no concealed damage has been identified in these parts before this window closes.

evt-024.summary: Missing Documentation Follow-Up — SUP-0117 (Standard Parts, 5-Day Window Closing)
evt-024.description: 5-business-day missing documentation response deadline for Precision Gear Works (SUP-0117). Packing slip discrepancy identified in REC-20260409-006 — supplier was contacted per §12.4 on 2026-04-09. If documentation not received by EOD today, escalate to NCR (Minor) per §12.4 and notify Joon-ho Park. Update receiving_log.xlsx and ncr_log.xlsx.

evt-025.summary: Q2 Internal Audit Prep — Notify Receiving Team (Theo Brandt)
evt-025.description: Per SOP §19.3.1, Theo Brandt (@tbrandt) notifies the Receiving team approximately one week before the Q2 audit window opens (first two weeks of July). Notification includes list of receipts to be sampled from April–June. Coordinator should ensure receiving_log.xlsx and ncr_log.xlsx are current and all COCs/MTRs for safety-critical receipts are filed in the correct folders.

evt-026.summary: Q2 Quarterly Internal Audit Window — Quality Team (Theo Brandt)
evt-026.description: Q2 quarterly internal audit of receiving operations per §19.3.1. Sample period: April–June receipts. Coordinator must respond to record retrieval requests within 1 business day (§19.3.2). Do not modify records under audit review. Continue normal receiving operations in parallel. Audit reviews: receiving log completeness, NCR severity accuracy, quarantine flag timing, escalation routing, handoff post publication, and self-reported timing breaches.

evt-027.summary: Q3 Quarterly Internal Audit Window — Quality Team (Theo Brandt)
evt-027.description: Q3 quarterly internal audit per §19.3.1. Sample period: July–September receipts. Coordinator must be available for record requests and follow-up questions from Theo Brandt's audit team. Do not modify records under review. See §19.3.2 for full coordinator obligations during audit.

evt-028.summary: Q4 Quarterly Internal Audit Window — Quality Team (Theo Brandt)
evt-028.description: Q4 quarterly internal audit per §19.3.1. Sample period: October–December 2026 receipts. Coordinator must be available for record requests and follow-up questions. Note: audit covers the full prior year's Q4. Begin preparing Q4 records for retrieval readiness before the holiday period. See §19.3 for full audit protocol.

evt-029.summary: SOP Annual Review Deadline — SOP-LOG-MER-02 v4.2
evt-029.description: Next scheduled review of SOP-LOG-MER-02 (Inbound Receiving & Supplier Nonconformance) per §22.1. Document owner: Elizabeth Velasquez (Plant Logistics Manager). Approved by: Walter Finch (Plant Manager). Current version: 4.2, effective 2026-02-01. Coordinator should submit any proposed revisions or observed off-SOP situations (§22.4) to Elizabeth Velasquez prior to this date.

evt-030.summary: Weekly Receiving Team Standup — Darnell Hooks (Supervisor)
evt-030.description: Weekly Receiving team standup with Darnell Hooks. Review: open NCRs and their upcoming deadlines, any quarantine material awaiting re-inspection, repeat-offender supplier watch list (§15.3), open receipts from prior week, and unusual shipments expected this week (hazmat, oversize, inter-plant). Coordinator to bring receiving_log.xlsx and ncr_log.xlsx summaries.

evt-031.summary: Weekly Receiving Team Standup — Darnell Hooks (Supervisor)
evt-031.description: Weekly Receiving team standup with Darnell Hooks. Review: open NCRs and their upcoming deadlines, any quarantine material awaiting re-inspection, repeat-offender supplier watch list (§15.3), open receipts from prior week, and unusual shipments expected this week (hazmat, oversize, inter-plant). Coordinator to bring receiving_log.xlsx and ncr_log.xlsx summaries.

evt-032.summary: Supplier Performance Review — SUP-0117 Repeat-Offender Watch (Joon-ho Park)
evt-032.description: Meeting with Joon-ho Park (@jpark) to review Precision Gear Works (SUP-0117) repeat-offender status per §15.3. Supplier has 2 Major NCRs in the trailing 90 days. Third Major NCR would trigger automatic status review under §15.4. Coordinator to bring ncr_log.xlsx history for SUP-0117. Procurement to advise on whether status downgrade to Probationary is warranted.

evt-033.summary: Dock Appointment: Direct-to-Line Delivery — Production Planning Authorization Required
evt-033.description: APPT-20260420-001 | Carrier: FedEx Freight | Dock 1 | Supplier: Alloy Direct Supply (SUP-0041) | PO: MER-PO-8870 | Direct-to-line delivery per §17.3. Aditi Krishnamurthy (Production Planning) must authorize this delivery type in advance. Coordinator follows modified putaway process — does not route through normal quarantine/hold area. Confirm authorization in writing (Slack) before truck arrives.

evt-034.description: End-of-week email folder housekeeping per §18.5. Archive supplier response emails, NCR correspondence, and documentation requests by PO number. Confirm all NCR letters sent this week are saved in the correct ncr_log.xlsx row with the sent timestamp. Verify all packing slips and BOLs from the week are saved in the correct folders per §5.4 naming conventions.

evt-035.description: End-of-week email folder housekeeping per §18.5. Archive supplier response emails, NCR correspondence, and documentation requests by PO number. Confirm all NCR letters sent this week are saved in the correct ncr_log.xlsx row with the sent timestamp. Verify all packing slips and BOLs from the week are saved in the correct folders per §5.4 naming conventions.

evt-036.summary: Receiving Log Accuracy Self-Check — Monthly Spot Review
evt-036.description: Monthly self-check of receiving_log.xlsx for completeness. Verify all required columns are populated for every receipt this month. Check for any duplicate entries per §13.8. Confirm all safety-critical receipts have COC, MTR, and heat number fields populated. Flag any discrepancies to Maribel Ortiz (@mortiz) per §13.6 cross-shift correction procedure if the receipt is older than the current shift.

evt-037.description: NCR-2026-0035 opened for DS-7740 short ship on MER-PO-8812 (REC-20260414-002). Alloy Direct Supply (SUP-0041). Issue date: 2026-04-14.

evt-038.description: NCR letter deadline for NCR-2026-0035 (Alloy Direct Supply, DS-7740 short ship). NCR issued 2026-04-14.

evt-039.summary: Inbound Dock Appointment — SUP-0302 (Probationary Supplier, Enhanced Inspection)
evt-039.description: APPT-20260421-001 | Carrier: Saia LTL | Dock 3 | Supplier: Ridgeline Components (SUP-0302) | PO: MER-PO-8880 | Probationary supplier status per §15.2.3. Enhanced inspection required: 100% count verification, photograph all pallets before unloading begins, COC and packing slip must be on-site before any unloading is authorized. Coordinate with Curtis Yablonski (@cyablonski) and Theo Brandt (@tbrandt).

evt-040.summary: Q1 Internal Audit Window — Quality Team (Theo Brandt)
evt-040.description: Q1 quarterly internal audit of receiving operations per §19.3.1. Sample period: January–March 2026 receipts. Audit window open through April 14. Coordinator must respond to all remaining record retrieval requests from Theo Brandt (@tbrandt) before this window closes. Document any audit-triggered corrective actions per §19.4. Continue normal operations in parallel.
